grammar_points.title: 顺便 — While you're at it / At the same time
grammar_points.explanation: 顺便 means to do something as a secondary action while doing something else — 'while you're at it' or 'in passing'. It is placed before the verb of the secondary action. Structure: main action + 顺便 + secondary action. 我去超市，顺便给你买点东西 - I'm going to the supermarket; I'll pick something up for you while I'm at it.

examples.chinese: 他去机场接朋友，顺便把行李也带过来了。
examples.pinyin: Tā qù jī chǎng jiē péng yǒu, shùn biàn bǎ xíng li yě dài guò lái le.
examples.english: He went to the airport to pick up his friend and brought the luggage over while he was at it.

examples.chinese: 我去大使馆办签证，顺便了解一下当地文化。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ qù dà shǐ guǎn bàn qiān zhèng, shùn biàn liǎo jiě yí xià dāng dì wén huà.
examples.english: I went to the embassy to handle the visa and also learned about the local culture while I was there.

exercises.question: 我去取登机牌，_____帮你问一下航班时间。
Choose the sentence that uses 顺便 correctly.

options: 他出差，顺便去参观了当地的名胜。
顺便他出差，去参观了当地的名胜。
他出差去参观，顺便了当地的名胜。

Tā chū chāi qù cān guān, shùn biàn le dāng dì de míng shèng.
Tā shùn biàn, chū chāi qù cān guān le dāng dì de míng shèng.

grammar_points.title: 来不及 / 来得及 — No time / Still have time
grammar_points.explanation: 来不及 means there is not enough time to do something. 来得及 means there is still time. Both are placed after the subject and before the action. Structure: Subject + 来不及/来得及 + verb. 我们来不及赶飞机了 - We don't have time to catch the plane. / 别急，还来得及 - Don't rush, there's still time.

examples.chinese: 航班马上就要起飞了，我们来不及办理登机手续了。
examples.pinyin: Háng bān mǎ shàng jiù yào qǐ fēi le, wǒ men lái bù jí bàn lǐ dēng jī shǒu xù le.
examples.english: The flight is about to take off; we don't have time to check in anymore.

examples.chinese: 别担心，现在出发还来得及，航班还有两个小时。
examples.pinyin: Bié dān xīn, xiàn zài chū fā hái lái de jí, háng bān hái yǒu liǎng gè xiǎo shí.
examples.english: Don't worry, if we leave now there's still time; the flight is in two hours.

grammar_points.title: 推迟 — To postpone / To delay
grammar_points.explanation: 推迟 means to put something off to a later time. It is typically used with activities, events, or plans. Structure: Subject + 把 + plan + 推迟 + (到 + new time) / or Subject + 推迟 + verb phrase. 会议推迟到下周了 - The meeting has been postponed to next week. / 他们推迟了出发时间 - They delayed the departure time.

examples.chinese: 由于天气原因，航班被推迟了两个小时。
examples.pinyin: Yóu yú tiān qì yuán yīn, háng bān bèi tuī chí le liǎng gè xiǎo shí.
examples.english: Due to weather conditions, the flight was delayed by two hours.

examples.chinese: 他们把旅行计划推迟到下个月，等签证办好再出发。
examples.pinyin: Tā men bǎ lǚ xíng jì huà tuī chí dào xià gè yuè, děng qiān zhèng bàn hǎo zài chū fā.
examples.english: They postponed their travel plan to next month, waiting until the visa is ready before departing.

culture_notes.title: China's High-Speed Rail — The World's Largest Network
culture_notes.title_chinese: 中国高铁——世界最大铁路网
culture_notes.content: China operates the world's largest high-speed rail (高铁, gāo tiě) network, spanning over 40,000 kilometres. Trains such as the 复兴号 (Fùxīng Hào, 'Rejuvenation') reach speeds of up to 350 km/h, connecting major cities across the country in hours rather than days. The network has transformed domestic travel, often making high-speed rail a faster and more convenient alternative to flying for distances under 1,000 km. Passengers appreciate the spacious seats, punctuality, and city-centre stations that eliminate the need for long airport commutes. The expansion of 高铁 reflects China's broader push for modern infrastructure and has become a source of national pride.

idioms.english: Have a smooth journey (a common farewell to travellers)

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 您好，我的航班是CA302，请问还来得及办理登机手续吗？

lines.english: Hello, my flight is CA302. Is there still time to check in?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 来得及，还有四十分钟。请把您的登机牌和护照给我看一下。
lines.pinyin: Lái de jí, hái yǒu sì shí fēn zhōng. Qǐng bǎ nín de dēng jī pái hé hù zhào gěi wǒ kàn yí xià.
lines.english: Yes, there are still forty minutes. Please show me your boarding pass and passport.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 好的，给您。我这次是出差，签证是公司帮我申请的。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, gěi nín. Wǒ zhè cì shì chū chāi, qiān zhèng shì gōng sī bāng wǒ shēn qǐng de.
lines.english: Here you are. I'm on a business trip this time; the company applied for the visa on my behalf.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 明白了。请问您有几件行李要托运？
lines.pinyin: Míng bai le. Qǐng wèn nín yǒu jǐ jiàn xíng li yào tuō yùn?
lines.english: I see. How many bags would you like to check in?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 只有一件。对了，我想顺便问一下，飞机会准时出发吗？
lines.pinyin: Zhǐ yǒu yí jiàn. Duì le, wǒ xiǎng shùn biàn wèn yí xià, fēi jī huì zhǔn shí chū fā ma?
lines.english: Just one. By the way, I'd like to ask — will the plane depart on time?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 目前没有推迟，预计准时起飞。祝您旅行顺利！
lines.pinyin: Mù qián méi yǒu tuī chí, yù jì zhǔn shí qǐ fēi. Zhù nín lǚ xíng shùn lì!
lines.english: There are no delays at the moment; it is expected to take off on time. Have a smooth trip!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 太好了，谢谢您！希望能顺利降落，平安抵达。
lines.pinyin: Tài hǎo le, xiè xie nín! Xī wàng néng shùn lì jiàng luò, píng ān dǐ dá.
lines.english: Great, thank you! I hope we land safely and arrive without any problems.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 打扰一下，我好像迷路了。请问大使馆怎么走？
lines.pinyin: Dǎ rǎo yí xià, wǒ hǎo xiàng mí lù le. Qǐng wèn dà shǐ guǎn zěn me zǒu?
lines.english: Excuse me, I think I'm lost. How do I get to the embassy?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 大使馆在高速公路旁边，从这里走大概二十分钟。
lines.pinyin: Dà shǐ guǎn zài gāo sù gōng lù páng biān, cóng zhè lǐ zǒu dà gài èr shí fēn zhōng.
lines.english: The embassy is next to the highway; it's about a twenty-minute walk from here.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我乘坐地铁来的，没想到出站口找错了，就迷路了。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ chéng zuò dì tiě lái de, méi xiǎng dào chū zhàn kǒu zhǎo cuò le, jiù mí lù le.
lines.english: I came by subway but accidentally took the wrong exit and got lost.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没关系。你可以先坐公共汽车到高速公路出口，再步行五分钟。
lines.pinyin: Méi guān xi. Nǐ kě yǐ xiān zuò gōng gòng qì chē dào gāo sù gōng lù chū kǒu, zài bù xíng wǔ fēn zhōng.
lines.english: No problem. You can take a bus to the highway exit and then walk five minutes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我是来申请旅行签证的，导游说要带很多证明文件。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ shì lái shēn qǐng lǚ xíng qiān zhèng de, dǎo yóu shuō yào dài hěn duō zhèng míng wén jiàn.
lines.english: I'm here to apply for a travel visa; the tour guide said I need to bring many supporting documents.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那你要抓紧时间，大使馆下午五点关门，来不及的话就要明天再来了。
lines.pinyin: Nà nǐ yào zhuā jǐn shí jiān, dà shǐ guǎn xià wǔ wǔ diǎn guān mén, lái bù jí de huà jiù yào míng tiān zài lái le.
lines.english: Then you should hurry; the embassy closes at 5 p.m. If you run out of time, you'll have to come back tomorrow.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 谢谢您！我这就出发，希望还来得及！
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie nín! Wǒ zhè jiù chū fā, xī wàng hái lái de jí!
lines.english: Thank you! I'll head off right now — I hope there's still time!
